site.title: #1 TikTok Shop Health & Wellness Affiliate 2025 | Hammad Media
site.description: TikTok Shop's #1 Health & Wellness affiliate for 2025. One creator, two accounts, $8M+ GMV all time. Send me your supplement. I turn it into a bestseller.

hero.headline: I turn supplements into bestsellers.
hero.subheadline: TikTok Shop's #1 Health & Wellness affiliate for 2025. Two accounts. $2.79M+ GMV in 2026 so far. 105M+ product views. 113K+ units sold. I write, film, and post every video myself.

steps.title: Send me your product
steps.text: Ship me one sample. Set an affiliate commission on TikTok Shop. I focus on supplements and wellness products. My audience already buys these products.

steps.title: I create the content
steps.text: I make every review video myself. Strong openings. Real product demonstrations. Honest opinions. The first video is usually live within 48 hours after your sample arrives. No editors. No agencies. No waiting for approvals.

steps.title: You check every sale
steps.text: My videos go live on both accounts. You see every sale in your own TikTok Shop Seller Center. You do not need to trust my screenshots. You check the real numbers yourself.

partnership.heading: Ways to partner
partnership.sub: Three ways to work together. In every deal, I earn more when you sell more. Pick the priority level you want for your product.

tiers.name: Boosted Commission
tiers.text: For products with 10,000+ units already sold on TikTok Shop. You raise my commission rate. I test your product in my videos. You pay only when your product sells. There is no fixed number of videos. I make more videos for products that sell well. Higher commission rates get priority.

tiers.name: Retainer + Commission
tiers.text: You get a guaranteed number of review videos every month. I post them on both accounts. I also earn commission on every sale. You pay upfront, month to month. No long-term contract.

tiers.name: Exclusive
tiers.text: One brand per product category. I never promote your competitors. Your products get the whole category on both accounts. Pricing is retainer + commission + performance bonuses. Once your category is taken, it is closed.
tiers.price: From $50,000 per month — complete health & wellness exclusivity

partnership.note: Every deal pays me the most when your product sells. I win only when you win. I am one person, not an agency. So I keep a strict limit: four new products each month, no more. You could mail samples to one hundred small creators. That gets you one hundred small tests. Or you could work with the #1 affiliate in your category. That gets you a clear result in the first week. When the month is full, the next spot goes to the product that fits best. Supplement and wellness brands always come first.

contact.heading: Work with me
contact.subheading: Tell me about your product: your TikTok Shop link, your category, and the commission you can offer. I accept at most four new products each month. Slots go to the products that fit best. I reply to every brand inquiry within 24 hours. The person who replies is the person who makes your videos. If your product fits, the next step is a short call. On the call, I show you my live sales dashboards.

faq.heading: Questions brands ask

items.q: How fast is the first video?
items.a: Fast. Your sample arrives. You set the commission rate. The first video is usually live within **48 hours** after that. Retainer partners get a guaranteed number of videos every month.
It depends on your product price and your profit margin.
bullets: Most products I accept pay **20–35%** commission on TikTok Shop
Higher rates get priority in my posting schedule
Performance bonuses move you to the top of the list for your category

items.a: **Yes to talking points. No to approvals.** Send me your key points. I will read every word. But I do not send drafts. I do not re-film after brand notes. The video goes straight from my camera to my audience. Here is why: when brands edit videos, the videos feel like ads. Ads do not sell on TikTok Shop. Every number on this page comes from working this way.

On commission deals, you risk only **one product sample**. I carry all the other risk. I do not stop after one video. I test different openings and styles. Some products need three videos before one becomes a top seller. My biggest winner took more than 200 videos across two years. If a product does not fit my audience, I will tell you directly. That saves time for both of us.
Pricing is per video, **paid upfront**. We agree on the video count before we start:
bullets: Month to month — no long-term contract.
items.tail: Smaller budget? If your product already has **10,000+ units sold** on TikTok Shop, start with Boosted Commission. You pay only when you get sales.

items.q: What does my retainer actually guarantee?
items.a: Your retainer buys a **guaranteed number of review videos**. We agree on the count before we start. I post them on both accounts, every month, on schedule.
bullets: You check every attributed sale in your own TikTok Shop Seller Center
Invoices come from **Hammad Media LLC**, a registered US company
Month to month — you can stop after one month

items.q: How does the Exclusive tier work?
items.a: Exclusivity means I never promote your competitors. Complete health & wellness exclusivity starts at **$50,000 per month**, **paid upfront**:
bullets: **Category exclusivity** — retainer + commission + performance bonuses. Price depends on the category.
Example: you lock the collagen category. Then only your collagen appears on my accounts.
Month to month. One brand per category — once a category is taken, it is closed.

items.q: Can we run your videos as ads?
items.a: Yes — through TikTok Spark Ads. I give you an authorization code. You can then boost any of my videos as an ad from my own handle. This works better than posting the video file on your brand account. You can also use my videos in your GMV Max campaigns. We agree on ad usage rights in each deal. If ad usage matters to you, say so in your inquiry. I will include it in the offer.

items.q: Our team is not based in the US — can we still work together?
items.a: Yes. Many of my partners run TikTok Shop US from outside the US. The process is simple. You ship the sample from your US warehouse. We agree on terms over email. For retainers, Hammad Media LLC sends you an invoice. It is a registered US company. You pay upfront by bank transfer. Commission-only deals need no payment setup at all. TikTok Shop pays my commission automatically.

faq.sub: Clear answers. The same answers I give on every call.

legal.disclaimer: Brand names and product images appear here only to show my affiliate sales history. They do not mean that any brand sponsors or endorses this site. All trademarks belong to their respective owners.
legal.privacy: Privacy: messages from this form go to my inbox. I use them only to reply to you. I never sell your information. I never add you to a marketing list. This site uses Google Analytics to count page visits.

receipts.sub: Six products. $1.1M in sales since January 1, 2026. Every top video is linked — check the views yourself.

funnel.title: From views to orders
funnel.caption: TikTok Shop dashboards, Jan 1 – Jun 8, 2026, both accounts.
funnel.frame: Anyone can show one big number. So here are my rates at each step. They stay steady across 105M+ product views.
